searchType.title: Search type
searchType.description: Which roles to search against, mirroring the directory's advanced search. 'current' = people by their current role, 'former' = by a former (e.g. government) role, 'combined' = match both a current and a former role.

text.title: Keyword / free text
text.description: Full-text search across profiles (name, headline, biography, roles).
text.sectionDescription: All filters are optional and mirror the formergov.com advanced search. Multi-value fields accept human-readable names (resolved to ids automatically) or raw UUIDs.

practiceAreas.title: Practice areas
practiceAreas.description: Practice-area names (e.g. "Cybersecurity", "Corporate Law"). Resolved to ids via the directory's meta endpoint.

agency.title: Agency
agency.description: Agency name or id. To resolve a name to an id, also set Jurisdiction (the directory keys agencies by jurisdiction).

hasNoCurrentRoles.title: Has no current roles
hasNoCurrentRoles.description: Restrict to people with no current role listed.

openTo.title: Open to
openTo.description: Filter by what the person is open to (e.g. board opportunities, speaking).

dateRange.title: Date range
dateRange.description: Date-range filter value as used by the advanced search (advanced).

combinedFilters.title: Combined search - second leg
combinedFilters.description: Only used when Search type = Combined. Filters for the SECOND role leg. Keys (no 'combined' prefix): functions, employer, city, state, country, positionType, jurisdiction, agency, district, isGovernment, dateRange, hasNoCurrentRoles. Example: {"jurisdiction": "FEDERAL", "functions": ["Cybersecurity"]}
combinedFilters.sectionDescription: Power-user options for full parity with the site's advanced search.

extraSearchParams.title: Extra raw search params
extraSearchParams.description: Raw query parameters merged verbatim into the search request. Escape hatch for any filter not exposed above. Example: {"score": "1"}

profileUsernames.title: Specific usernames
profileUsernames.description: Scrape these directory usernames directly and skip search entirely (e.g. "brianlevine"). Also accepts full profile URLs.
profileUsernames.sectionDescription: If set, search filters above are ignored and only these profiles are scraped.

startUrls.title: Profile URLs
startUrls.description: Profile page URLs like https://formergov.com/directory/brianlevine. Scraped directly (search is skipped if any are provided).

maxItems.title: Max profiles
maxItems.description: Maximum number of profiles to scrape (0 = no limit). Note: deep pagination on the search API is windowed, so very large limits may not reach every result in one run.

useNjsparserFallback.title: Use njsparser page fallback
useNjsparserFallback.description: If a profile's JSON API call fails, fall back to parsing the Next.js page with njsparser to recover contact info.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Proxy servers used by the scraper. Apify Proxy (datacenter) is sufficient for this API.
